  "findings": [
    "Misreading or misapplying APWA uniform color codes for utility markings (red, yellow, blue, green, orange)."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all excavation and ground-disturbing activities immediately.",
    "Re-verify all utility locates with the local 811 one-call center and facility operators.",
    "Remark the site using the correct APWA color-coded paint and flags before resuming work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Misinterpreting or misapplying the standard APWA utility marking colors poses an immediate, critical safety risk of utility strikes, explosion, electrocution, or environmental release during excavation.",
  "references": [
    "CGA Best Practices Version 18.0, Section 3-14: Uniform Color Code",
    "ANSI Standard Z535.1"
  ]
}
